dealOfTheDay.title: Parish Tins Spring Gift — $250 in Acadiana Gift Cards for $25
dealOfTheDay.description: Each tin contains 25 coasters worth $10 each at different local restaurants — that's $250 in dining value for $25. Perfect for visitors, gift-giving, or treating yourself.
dealOfTheDay.highlight: Limited spring run — order before they sell out

featuredPartners.name: Parish Tins
featuredPartners.description: Parish Tins are beautiful gift tins packed with 25 gift card coasters — each worth $10 at a different Acadiana restaurant. Pay $25, unlock $250 in local dining. It's the best deal in the parish.
highlights: $250 total dining value in one tin
